BetRivers Sportsbook Bonuses & Promotions

If you love sports you probably don’t need an incentive to put some action on your favorite game, but we also know that players who like to play online, love to have fun! So while we have a plethora of wagering options to place online in Ohio, to keep you entertained 24/7, we wanted to boost the thrill factor by offering up exciting daily and weekly promotions. At BetRivers Sportsbook, it’s about Fun and Fair Gambling without all the gimmicks!

You are welcome to register from any state in the U.S., but must be 21+ years old and physically located in Ohio to wager. Not valid for any participant of the Ohio Casino Control Commission Time Out Ohio Program. If you or someone you know has a gambling problem, call 1-800-589-9966. Sports Wagering Services will be provided in partnership with Dayton Real Estate Ventures, LLC d/b/a Hollywood Gaming at Dayton Raceway.

This Website uses cookies. We use cookies to improve your experience, to analyze how you use our website, and to support the marketing of our products and services.
